Namkeen · Est. 1951

Mung

મગ

"Tiny, crunchy and packed with goodness."

Our Mung namkeen is made from whole green moong beans that are soaked, dried and deep-fried until perfectly crunchy. Lightly spiced with just salt and pepper, they are one of the most nutritious snacks in our range — high in plant protein, fibre and essential minerals. A wholesome crunch you can feel good about.

Spice Level

🔴⚪⚪⚪ Very Mild

Shelf Life

20 days

Available In

250g · 500g · 1kg

Best With

As a protein-rich snack

Order on WhatsApp ← Full Menu

How It's Made

કેવી રીતે બને છે

Every batch at SSKFG is made by hand, the same way it has been since 1951. No shortcuts. No machines doing what hands can do better.

1

Whole green moong is soaked for 8–10 hours, then spread and air-dried completely.

2

The dried moong is deep-fried in fresh oil until they puff up and turn golden-brown.

3

They are then seasoned immediately while hot so the spices adhere well.

Ingredients

સામગ્રી

Whole Green MoongVegetable OilSaltBlack PepperRed Chilli Powder

✓ No major allergens
